title: The Oasis Within a Desert

scenes.text: Welcome to the only oasis built around a lagoon in South America.
This is Huacachina, located in the Ica Region of Peru.
The oasis is surrounded by massive sand dunes that rise over 100 meters tall.
It’s a popular spot for sandboarding and sunset views.
scenes.label: SANDBOARDING PARADISE

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Huacachina, Ica Region - Peru. This unique oasis surrounded by towering dunes offers incredible adventures in sandboarding and breathtaking sunsets. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
